dialogos.texto_en: Is the graduation trip over already?\nIt went by so fast.
But it was fun, wasn't it?\nRaiha-chan, did you enjoy it?
Yes, it became such a wonderful memory.
We did a lot of sightseeing, activities, and shopping.
I also can't forget all the delicious food we had.
But still, I wish we had a little more time.\nThere were some places we couldn't go.
Yeah, and with what happened with Daddy%p-2;――
Oh, speaking of that.\nI completely forgot about Yotsuba's test\nbecause of what happened with him.
Test? What test?
Ah, now I remember.
We've been trying to avoid that all together.
What, are you still plotting something?\nIf so, come clean.\nI won't be surprised by anything anymore.
Yeah.\nIt's not like it's\nsomething we need to hide or anything%p-2;――
You know about the plan\nto make Yotsuba go into crisis mode, right?
Yeah, there's actually more to it.\nIt's about how long we'd continue the plan.
During this trip, Yotsuba passes the test\nif she stops using polite language with you, Uesugi-kun,\nor if she can call you by your first name.
Well, that's how we kind of\njust arbitrarily decided things.
Ehhhhh...
What? You guys were that detailed in your planning?
Well, like this, passing or not doesn't really matter\nanymore. How someone speaks is trivial.
Ha-ha-ha!\nSorry to say, but we've already passed that test.
HUH?!
Really?
Yes, really!
Yotsuba, is that right?
Umm...ahaha...
Wow, when did that happen?\nTell us, Yotsuba!
It's a secret.
A secret?\nThat's pretty suspicious. Is it really true?
Alright, let's see some proof then.
Okay, Yotsuba.\nCall me by my name right now!
Wha-whaaaaaaa?!\nNo, I can't do that so suddenly, Uesugi-san!
Oh? Isn't that how Yotsuba-san\nusually talks to big bro?
Are you just trying to show off, Uesugi-kun?
No, that's not it!
Well, I guess it's unrealistic\nto expect an instant change like that.
Let's take it at our own pace, Yotsuba.
Yeah!\nThat's probably the best way to do it.
Hmm?\nFutaro-kun's not getting worked up about it.\nThat actually makes it seem more genuine.
Mmmhh, when did this happen?
Yotsuba, tell us.
I told you, it's a secret.
Ugh, why are you so nosy? Let's just go home.
Yes!\nLet's all go home together!
